items.name: Lobster Mac & Cheese
items.description: Cavatappi noodles, lobster and cream sauce with gruyere and white cheddar cheeses topped with truffle bread crumbs. Served with choice of salad.
items.simplified_description: Pasta with lobster and creamy cheese sauce topped with truffle bread crumbs.

items.name: Seafood Pasta
items.description: Prawns, lobster, PEI mussels, tomato and fettuccine in creamy Creole sauce.
items.simplified_description: Fettuccine with prawns, lobster, mussels, tomato, and creamy Creole sauce.

items.name: Ginger Beef
items.description: Breaded beef, sweet and spiced ginger sauce over steamed rice and teriyaki wok vegetables.
items.simplified_description: Breaded beef with sweet ginger sauce, rice, and teriyaki vegetables.

items.name: Teriyaki Chicken
items.description: Tender chicken, mushrooms and garden vegetables with teriyaki sauce over steamed noodles. - Gluten Friendly

items.name: Fettuccine Alfredo
items.description: Cream, butter, garlic, white wine, parmesan and fettuccine.

items.name: MCM
items.description: A true classic Cafe dish. Fried chicken, mushrooms and melted mozza. Marvelous Mushrooms, red-skin garlic mashed potatoes and seasonal vegetables.
items.simplified_description: Fried chicken with mushrooms, mozzarella, mashed potatoes, and vegetables.

items.description: Grilled chicken breast, smoked bacon, honey mustard sauce, mushrooms, melted jack and cheddar cheeses. Red-skin garlic mashed potato and seasonal vegetables. - Gluten Friendly

items.name: Chicken Tenders
items.description: Chicken breast strips breaded in our signature seasoned flour. Fries and house honey mustard.

items.name: Fish & Chips
items.description: Two North Atlantic cod loins in ale batter. Served with fries and house-made tartar.
items.simplified_description: Battered cod loins with fries and tartar sauce.

items.name: Steak Frites
items.description: 7 oz Top Sirloin, dusted onions and Caesar salad. Fries and garlic aioli.

items.description: 7 oz Top Sirloin, dusted onions, red-skin masked potato and seasonal vegetables. - Gluten Friendly
